📋 [M2-SUMMATIVE] Module 3 & 4 — All 10 Questions: Complete Answer Tables

Answers derived strictly from the option values listed in the quiz file. ✅ = Previously answered correctly (as marked in file).

Question 1 — MOV AX,0123 / BX,4567 / CX,89AB / DX,CDEF + Arithmetic

Series of instructions in sequence. All registers/flags initially 0.

#InstructionDestination OperandSFZFAFPFCFOF
1MOV AX, 0123AX = 0123H000000
2MOV BX, 4567BX = 4567H000000
3MOV CX, 89ABCX = 89ABH000000
4MOV DX, CDEFDX = CDEFH000000
5ADD AX, BXAX = 468AH000000
6ADC AX, CXAX = D035H101100
7DAAAX = D03BH10100X
8INC AXAX = D03CH100100
9AAAAX = D102HXX1X1X
10SUB BX, CXBX = BBBCH101011
11SBB AX, DXAX = 0312H001100
12DEC AXAX = 0311H000100
13DASAX = 0311H00010X
14NEG AXAX = FCEFH101010
15AASAX = FB09HXX1X1X

Question 2 — MOV AL,67 / BL,89 + Logic & Shift/Rotate

Series of instructions in sequence. All registers/flags initially 0.

#InstructionDestination OperandSFZFPFCFAFOF
1MOV AL, 67AL = 67H000000
2MOV BL, 89BL = 89H000000
3AND BL, ALBL = 01H0000X0
4OR BL, ALBL = 67H0000X0
5NOT BLBL = 98H0000X0
6XOR BL, ALBL = FFH1010X0
7TEST AL, BLAL = 67H0000X0
8SHL AL, 1AL = CEH1000X1
9SAR AL, 1AL = E7H1010X0
10ROL AL, 1AL = CFH1011X0
11RCL AL, 1AL = 9FH1011X0
12MOV CL, 5CL = 05H1011X0
13ROR AL, CLAL = FCH101XXX
14SHR AL, CLAL = 07H0001XX
15RCR AL, CLAL = 78H0010XX

Question 3 — MOV AL,7B / BL,05 + Logic/Shift/Rotate + STC/SAHF/CLC/LAHF/CMC

Series of instructions in sequence. All registers/flags initially 0.

#InstructionDestination OperandSFZFPFCFAFOF
1MOV AL, 7BAL = 7BH000000
2MOV BL, 05BL = 05H000000
3AND BL, ALBL = 01H0000X0
4OR BL, ALBL = 7BH0010X0
5NOT BLBL = 84H0010X0
6XOR BL, ALBL = FFH1010X0
7TEST AL, BLAL = 7BH0010X0
8SHL AL, 1AL = F6H1010X1
9SAR AL, 1AL = FBH1000X0
10ROL AL, 1AL = F7H1001X0
11RCL AL, 1AL = EFH1001X0
12MOV CL, 5CL = 05H1001X0
13ROR AL, CLAL = 7FH000XXX
14SHR AL, CLAL = 03H0011XX
15RCR AL, CLAL = 38H0010XX
16STCAL = 38H (CF→1)0011XX
17MOV AH, 25AH = 25H00110X
18SAHFAH = 25H (flags←AH)00110X
19CLCAH = 25H (CF→0)00100X
20LAHFAH = 06H (AH←flags)00100X
21CMCAH = 06H (CF→1)00110X

Question 4 — MOV AL,AB / BL,CD + Logic/Shift/Rotate + STC/SAHF/CLC/LAHF/CMC

Series of instructions in sequence. All registers/flags initially 0.

#InstructionDestination OperandSFZFPFCFAFOF
1MOV AL, ABAL = ABH000000
2MOV BL, CDBL = CDH000000
3AND BL, ALBL = 89H1000X0
4OR BL, ALBL = ABH1000X0
5NOT BLBL = 54H1000X0
6XOR BL, ALBL = FFH1010X0
7TEST AL, BLAL = ABH1000X0
8SHL AL, 1AL = 56H0011X1
9SAR AL, 1AL = 2BH0010X0
10ROL AL, 1AL = 56H0010X0
11RCL AL, 1AL = ACH1010X1
12MOV CL, 5CL = 05H1010X1
13ROR AL, CLAL = 65H001XXX
14SHR AL, CLAL = 03H0010XX
15RCR AL, CLAL = 30H0010XX
16STCAL = 30H (CF→1)0011XX
17MOV AH, EFAH = EFH00110X
18SAHFAH = EFH (flags←AH)11110X
19CLCAH = EFH (CF→0)11100X
20LAHFAH = C6H (AH←flags)11100X
21CMCAH = C6H (CF→1)11110X

Question 5 — Program Trace (DS=8000H, SS=8001H, ALPHA=0020H)

All flags/registers initially 0. Memory at DS:0020H = 0050H, SS:0050H = 0010H, [BP] at SS:0040H = 1F31H.

#InstructionDestination OperandSFZFPFCFAFOF
1MOV AX, ALPHAAX = 0050H000000
2MOV SP, AXSP = 0050H000000
3POP BXBX = 0010H000000
4ADD BX, AXBX = 0060H001000
5SUB BX, 0020HBX = 0040H000000
6XCHG BX, BPBX = 0000H000000
7MOV CX, [BP]CX = 1F31H000000
8SBB AX, CXAX = E11FH100110
9ADC AX, 0029HAX = E149H100010
10ADD AL, CLAL = 7AH000000
11DAAAL = 80H10001X
12NEG AXAX = 1E80H000100
13LEA SI, ALPHASI = 0020H000100
14MOV DX, [SI]DX = 0050H000100
15INC DXDX = 0051H000100

Question 6 — MOV AL,CD / BL,EF + Logic & Shift/Rotate ✅ Previously Answered

Series of instructions in sequence. All registers/flags initially 0.

#InstructionDestination OperandSFZFPFCFAFOF
1MOV AL, CDAL = CDH000000
2MOV BL, EFBL = EFH000000
3AND BL, ALBL = CDH1000X0
4OR BL, ALBL = CDH1000X0
5NOT BLBL = 32H1000X0
6XOR BL, ALBL = FFH1010X0
7TEST AL, BLAL = CDH1000X0
8SHL AL, 1AL = 9AH1011X0
9SAR AL, 1AL = CDH1000X0
10ROL AL, 1AL = 9BH1001X0
11RCL AL, 1AL = 37H1001X1
12MOV CL, 5CL = 05H1001X1
13ROR AL, CLAL = B9H100XXX
14SHR AL, CLAL = 05H0011XX
15RCR AL, CLAL = 58H0000XX

Question 7 — Program Trace (DS=8003H, SS=8001H, ALPHA=0030H) ✅ Previously Answered

All flags/registers initially 0. Memory at DS:ALPHA=0010H; SS:0010H=DF20H; [BP] at DS:0010H=0050H.

#InstructionDestination OperandSFZFPFCFAFOF
1MOV AX, ALPHAAX = 0010H000000
2MOV SP, AXSP = 0010H000000
3POP BXBX = DF20H000000
4ADD BX, AXBX = DF30H100000
5SUB BX, 0020HBX = DF10H100000
6XCHG AX, BPAX = 0000H100000
7MOV CX, [BP]CX = 0050H100000
8SBB AX, CXAX = DEE9H100000
9ADC AX, 0029HAX = 2167H000110
10ADD AL, CLAL = 39H010100
11DAAAL = 99H10010X
12NEG AXAX = DEC0H110010
13LEA SI, ALPHASI = 0030H000110
14MOV DX, [SI]DX = 0010H000100
15INC DXDX = 0011H001100

Question 8 — MOV AL,01 / BL,23 + Logic/Shift/Rotate + STC/SAHF/CLC/LAHF/CMC

Series of instructions in sequence. All registers/flags initially 0.

#InstructionDestination OperandSFZFPFCFAFOF
1MOV AL, 01AL = 01H000000
2MOV BL, 23BL = 23H000000
3AND BL, ALBL = 01H0000X0
4OR BL, ALBL = 01H0000X0
5NOT BLBL = FEH0000X0
6XOR BL, ALBL = FFH1010X0
7TEST AL, BLAL = 01H0000X0
8SHL AL, 1AL = 02H0000X0
9SAR AL, 1AL = 01H0000X0
10ROL AL, 1AL = 02H0000X0
11RCL AL, 1AL = 04H0000X0
12MOV CL, 5CL = 05H0000X0
13ROR AL, CLAL = 20H000XXX
14SHR AL, CLAL = 01H0000XX
15RCR AL, CLAL = 10H0000XX
16STCAL = 10H (CF→1)0001XX
17MOV AH, 45AH = 45H00010X
18SAHFAH = 45H (flags←AH)01110X
19CLCAH = 45H (CF→0)01100X
20LAHFAH = 46H (AH←flags)01100X
21CMCAH = 46H (CF→1)01110X

Question 9 — MOV AL,CD / BL,EF + Logic/Shift/Rotate + STC/SAHF/CLC/LAHF/CMC

Series of instructions in sequence. All registers/flags initially 0. (Same initial values as Q6 + extra flag instructions)

#InstructionDestination OperandSFZFPFCFAFOF
1MOV AL, CDAL = CDH000000
2MOV BL, EFBL = EFH000000
3AND BL, ALBL = CDH1000X0
4OR BL, ALBL = CDH1000X0
5NOT BLBL = 32H1000X0
6XOR BL, ALBL = FFH1010X0
7TEST AL, BLAL = CDH1000X0
8SHL AL, 1AL = 9AH1011X0
9SAR AL, 1AL = CDH1000X0
10ROL AL, 1AL = 9BH1001X0
11RCL AL, 1AL = 37H1001X1
12MOV CL, 5CL = 05H1001X1
13ROR AL, CLAL = B9H100XXX
14SHR AL, CLAL = 05H0011XX
15RCR AL, CLAL = 58H0000XX
16STCAL = 58H (CF→1)0001XX
17MOV AH, 01AH = 01H00010X
18SAHFAH = 01H (flags←AH)00010X
19CLCAH = 01H (CF→0)00000X
20LAHFAH = 02H (AH←flags)00000X
21CMCAH = 02H (CF→1)00010X

Question 10 — MOV AL,67 / BL,89 + Logic/Shift/Rotate + STC/SAHF/CLC/LAHF/CMC

Series of instructions in sequence. All registers/flags initially 0. (Same initial values as Q2 + extra flag instructions)

#InstructionDestination OperandSFZFPFCFAFOF
1MOV AL, 67AL = 67H000000
2MOV BL, 89BL = 89H000000
3AND BL, ALBL = 01H0000X0
4OR BL, ALBL = 67H0000X0
5NOT BLBL = 98H0000X0
6XOR BL, ALBL = FFH1010X0
7TEST AL, BLAL = 67H0000X0
8SHL AL, 1AL = CEH1000X1
9SAR AL, 1AL = E7H1010X0
10ROL AL, 1AL = CFH1011X0
11RCL AL, 1AL = 9FH1011X0
12MOV CL, 5CL = 05H1011X0
13ROR AL, CLAL = FCH101XXX
14SHR AL, CLAL = 07H0001XX
15RCR AL, CLAL = 78H0010XX
16STCAL = 78H (CF→1)0011XX
17MOV AH, ABAH = ABH00110X
18SAHFAH = ABH (flags←AH)10010X
19CLCAH = ABH (CF→0)10000X
20LAHFAH = 82H (AH←flags)10000X
21CMCAH = 82H (CF→1)10010X

Legend: 1 = flag set  |  0 = flag cleared  |  X = undefined/don't care  |  Blue rows = STC/SAHF/CLC/LAHF/CMC section
